# Agent Identity — Beauty Business OS

This directory contains the AGI-1 Level 2 agent identity for this project.

## Files

- `identity.json` — Project identity, key components, fragile areas
- `state.json` — Cross-session state tracking
- `README.md` — This file

## What This Does

The identity.json file gives any AI working on this repo immediate context about what the project is, how it's structured, and what areas are fragile. This reduces ramp-up time and prevents accidental regressions.

## Generated By

AGI-1 Unified Orchestrator v1.0.0 on 2026-04-03.
